options.why: Current state has no blockers; biggest architectural risk is forced pipeline. Build priority intelligence before planning actions.
options.risk: May over-model if not bounded; keep non-executing.
options.proof_gap: Need proof that multiple alternatives are ranked and Action Planner is not automatic.
options.owner_goal_alignment: high: Owner explicitly wants smart priority choice, not forced steps.
options.expected_value: Prevents railroading and strengthens future full-Brain.
options.rejection_reason_if_not_selected: Selected because it directly addresses Owner correction and current gap.
